name: io.github.FunplayAI/funplay-godot-mcp
title: Funplay Godot MCP
description: stdio bridge for the local Godot Editor MCP server from FunplayAI/funplay-godot-mcp.

environmentVariables.name: FUNPLAY_GODOT_MCP_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional Godot MCP HTTP endpoint. Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:8765/.

environmentVariables.name: GODOT_MCP_URL
environmentVariables.description: Compatibility endpoint variable used when FUNPLAY_GODOT_MCP_URL is not set.
